title: New Media and Communication PhD Program Application and Fees
content:
New Media and Communication PhD Program Application and Fees

Online Applications for the 2025-2026 Spring Semester will begin on December 15, 2025.

Application Deadline: Wednesday, February 18, 2026

The Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

2025-2026 New Media and Communication Doctoral Program Spring Semester Entrance Exam

Interview Oral Exam: February 19, 2026

Exam Location: South Campus GDB 402

PROGRAM FEES:
